parsed_output.justification: Justin is the most suspicious player due to multiple contradictions in his claims; he first claimed to be the Tanner, then later claimed to be the Insomniac, and shifted his accusations between James and Mitchell. Laura (the Troublemaker) stated she swapped two players, and James subsequently claimed to be the Tanner, which suggests that Justin (starting Tanner) was swapped with James (starting Werewolf). If this swap occurred, Justin is now the Werewolf and James is the Tanner. Since the Tanner wants to be voted out and the Werewolf wants to survive, Justin's attempts to deflect suspicion onto others further support that he is the Werewolf.

Since the Tanner wants to be voted out and the Werewolf wants to survive, Justin's attempts to deflect suspicion onto others further support that he is the Werewolf.
